title: merge wt/multi-session-hardening into main: semantic conflict resolution + derived-artifact regen + full verify
action: The staged merge of wt/multi-session-hardening conflicts with lane-ceremony-v3 edits. Resolution owned by the orchestrator per the worktree integration contract: (1) .bee/cells/msh-*.json take the worktree side (capped truth; main copies are dropped stubs); (2) skills/bee-swarming/SKILL.md + docs/specs/workflow-state.md merged semantically keeping BOTH features contributions (msh claim-before-spawn doctrine + lane-ceremony-v3 changes); (3) derived artifacts (.claude-plugin/.codex-plugin trees incl. sidecars, release-manifest.json) NEVER hand-merged — resolve arbitrarily then REGENERATE via render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + release_manifest --write from merged canonicals; (4) full merged-config verify chain green before the merge commit; red => abort, main byte-untouched.
